_comment: Vendored snapshot of signing-critical UCP invariants for the scheduled drift guard (.github/workflows/ucp-drift.yml via scripts/verify-ucp-drift-snapshot.mjs). Not a protocol/runtime/conformance surface. Every invariants[] string was verified to appear verbatim in the pinned source markdown. When source.version_tag falls behind the latest upstream release, the drift job fails: review the upstream signing-spec changes and update this file.
